mainEntity.name: Does Utah require machine safety guards for comp claims in Draper?
mainEntity.text: Does Utah require machine safety guards for comp claims in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, missing guards (OSHA violation) proves negligence, supporting comp and third-party claims against employer/manufacturer.[1][3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Federal OSHA mandates guards on nip points/conveyors; Utah enforces. Photos of absent guards key evidence. Strengthens liability in Draper factories.[1]

name: OSHA Machine Guarding Requirements
description: Yes, missing guards (OSHA violation) proves negligence, supporting comp and third-party claims against employer/manufacturer.[1][3]
